title: Recording, recalling, and resuming with the Wizard's Journal
summary: The SI walks the Loom through the Wizard's Journal end-to-end. Type a journal entry from a fixture, record it, watch the success line. Then generate a session-resume bootstrap context. Then prove the entry is recallable. Six steps. The scenario doubles as the smallest reusable proof that Weaver's Tension scales beyond the Spinner-authoring flow.

fixtures.title: Weaver's Tension v2 — witnessed on both auth paths
fixtures.body: Witness Spinner invoked verifyScenario(webspinner-author) twice — once superuser, once webspinner. Both reported ok=true, 14/14 ribbon steps completed in ~15 seconds wall-clock. The build loop's verification primitive is live; Author can now ship diffs against an autonomous gate.

steps.title: Open the Wizard's Journal
steps.narration: Navigating to the Journal — the Cell's operational diary. Action, decision, problem, learning, note. Everything the Wizard records here is embedded for semantic recall and surfaces in the next-session bootstrap context.

steps.title: Pick the entry kind
steps.narration: Selecting 'learning' as the entry kind. Learnings are the entries that compound — the lived-experience layer alongside DECISIONS.md.

steps.title: Fill the entry
steps.narration: Typing the title, the body, the tags. The body is a real diary entry — the SI describing what it just verified, with enough specificity that semantic recall on terms like 'witness' or 'auth path' will surface it later.

steps.title: Record the entry
steps.narration: Submitting the form. The Loom calls the Wizard's Journal Spinner's record capability, which embeds the body via the Cell's embedding sidecar and persists the entry to PocketBase. A wp.spinner.invoke audit event lands. The form's success line appears.

steps.title: Generate a session-resume context
steps.narration: Scrolling to Session context. Clicking Generate. The bootstrap capability gathers recent actions, decisions, open questions, and synthesises the markdown context block a new Claude session needs to pick up where the last one left off. The entry we just recorded will be among the recent learnings.

steps.title: Audit log — invoke events recorded
steps.narration: Sanity check against the audit log. The Journal Spinner's record + bootstrap capabilities each emitted a wp.spinner.invoke event. Trust without faith: every Spinner call audited forever.
